content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Enforce per-origin concurrency, minimum intervals, Retry-After, bounded backoff, jitter, identification, and stale escalation.

hints: For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Origin Rate Policy model · Theory Feed Ts Origin…, name the reader, publisher, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, tenant, URL, unknown XML, runtime validation, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, PostgreSQL, Express, handle, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Ts Origin Rate Policy precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Origin Rate Policy model · Theory Feed Ts Origin…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 6741 during a clean emitted-package and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove Fetch stream limits, signal composition, validators, redirect policy, and publisher budgets; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then reorder one timer, Promise, claim, lease, fencing, worker, disconnect, or shutdown settlement and exclude stale effects. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Enforce per-origin concurrency, minimum intervals, Retry-After, bounded backoff, jitter, identification, and stale escalation.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Origin Rate Policy model · Theory Feed Ts Origin…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A Promise concurrency limit distributes requests fairly across publishers.

checks.description: The cumulative typescript portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: feed-ts-origin-rate-policy-s1x37f.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-ts-origin-rate-policy-s1x37f(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_feed_ts_origin_rate_policy_s1x37f\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?fetchCases < 10)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?settledFetches < 10 \|\| settledFetches > fetchCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?conditionalCases < 3)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?budgetViolations > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using enforce and origin plus specific case evidence.
